enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs early morning in Boulder after an all-night work session. He's building a book project called 'Plenty' (a compilation of Roman knowledge), listening to Rome-related podcasts, and mentions needing to run a car errand and pick up a rocket box from his mom's place.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: most interesting book he's ever made — considers Roman knowledge base impressive and significant
recently getting into them and finds them good, including Fall of Rome and Roman Inverse podcasts
worries him when she doesn't respond
